theory Chaum_Unforgeability

begin

// Function signature and definition of the equational theory E

functions: blind/2, checksign/2, fst/1, pair/2, pk/1, sign/2,
           snd/1, unblind/2
equations [convergent]:
    checksign(sign(m, k), pk(k)) = m,
    fst(<x.1, x.2>) = x.1,
    snd(<x.1, x.2>) = x.2,
    unblind(blind(m, r), r) = m,
    unblind(sign(blind(m, r), k), r) = sign(m, k)

rule (modulo E) Register_pk_Bank:
   [ Fr( ~ltkB ) ]
  -->
   [
   !Bank_Ltk( $B, ~ltkB ), !Bank_Pk( $B, pk(~ltkB) ), Out( pk(~ltkB) )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) B_1:
   [ In( blind(~x, r) ), !Bank_Ltk( $B, ~ltkB ) ]
  --[ Withdraw( ~x ) ]->
   [ Out( sign(blind(~x, r), ~ltkB) ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) S_1:
   [ In( <~x, sign(~x, ~ltkB)> ), !Bank_Pk( $B, pk(~ltkB) ) ]
  -->
   [ Out( <~x, sign(~x, ~ltkB)> ), St_S_1( $B, ~x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) B_2:
   [ In( <x, sign(x, ~ltkB)> ), !Bank_Ltk( $B, ~ltkB ) ]
  --[ Deposited( x ) ]->
   [ Private_Ch( x ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) S_2:
   [ Private_Ch( x ), St_S_1( $B, x ) ] --[ Spend( x ) ]-> [ ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

restriction BankOnlyAcceptsOnce:
  "∀ x #j #k.
    ((Deposited( x ) @ #j) ∧ (Deposited( x ) @ #k)) ⇒ (#j = #k)"
  // safety formula

  /*
  expanded formula:
  "∀ x #j #k.
    ((Deposited( x ) @ #j) ∧ (Deposited( x ) @ #k)) ⇒ (#j = #k)"
  */

lemma exec:
  exists-trace "∃ x #i. Spend( x ) @ #i"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all satisfying traces:
"∃ x #i. (Spend( x ) @ #i)"
*/
by sorry

lemma unforgeability:
  all-traces
  "∀ x #j.
    (Spend( x ) @ #j) ⇒
    (∃ #i.
      ((Withdraw( x ) @ #i) ∧ (#i < #j)) ∧
      (¬(∃ #l. (Spend( x ) @ #l) ∧ (¬(#l = #j)))))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ x #j.
  (Spend( x ) @ #j)
 ∧
  ∀ #i.
   (Withdraw( x ) @ #i)
  ⇒
   ((¬(#i < #j)) ∨ (∃ #l. (Spend( x ) @ #l) ∧ ¬(#l = #j)))"
*/
by sorry

/*
WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

Message Derivation Checks
=========================

  The variables of the following rule(s) are not derivable from their premises, you may be performing unintended pattern matching.

Rule B_1: 
Failed to derive Variable(s): ~x, r

Rule S_1: 
Failed to derive Variable(s): ~ltkB
*/

/*
Generated from:
Tamarin version 1.13.0
Maude version 3.5.1
Git revision: 0234f6a1abee25677c0accef62de0ac2883b0347 (with uncommited changes), branch: HEAD
Compiled at: 2026-07-16 18:33:16.036427196 UTC
*/

end
